updates.title: Be the First
updates.body: Louisiana Purchase announces events, seasonal menu launches, and special happenings on Instagram first. Follow us to stay in the loop on everything happening at North Park's premier Creole dining destination.
updates.imageAlt: Louisiana Purchase events North Park San Diego

props.title: Events & Happenings at Louisiana Purchase | North Park San Diego
props.description: Events, special occasions, and happenings at Louisiana Purchase in North Park, San Diego. Mardi Gras celebrations, seasonal menus, live music, and limited-time experiences at San Diego's premier Creole dining destination.

props.title: Events &
props.subtitle: From Mardi Gras celebrations to limited-time seasonal menus and live music nights — Louisiana Purchase brings the spirit of New Orleans to North Park year-round.
props.imageAlt: Events at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
Louisiana Purchase events and happenings North Park San Diego
props.title: Every Night Is
body: Louisiana Purchase doesn't need a special occasion to feel like one. But when the calendar calls for it — Mardi Gras, King's Day, a new seasonal menu launch, a local jazz ensemble on a Friday night — this room becomes something extraordinary.
Follow us on Instagram for the latest event announcements, or check back here for upcoming happenings and limited-time experiences.

props.title: Types of Events
props.subtitle: Year-round programming inspired by New Orleans culture and the rhythms of North Park.

props.imageAlt: Alligator cheesecake at a private event at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
props.title: Planning a Private
body: Louisiana Purchase is available for private events of all kinds — birthday celebrations, corporate dinners, rehearsal events, and full venue buyouts. The same space that hosts Mardi Gras can be yours exclusively.
Our events team handles every detail from first inquiry to last call. Capacity up to 80 guests.

props.title: Reserve Your Table.
props.subtitle: Louisiana Purchase is open seven days a week. Walk-ins welcome at the bar.
